activities_projects.title: Gender Inequality Research Report
activities_projects.objective: Critically analyse gender inequality in modern India
steps: Collect statistics about literacy rates, employment and wages for men and women
Compare these statistics and identify patterns of inequality
Write a report explaining the reasons and suggest policy solutions
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops research and analytical skills on gender inequality
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of research and policy suggestions (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Women’s Reservation Policy Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate the impact of reservation for women in politics
steps: Study the Women’s Reservation Act and reservation in Panchayati Raj
Analyse how reservation affects women's political participation
Present arguments supporting or opposing the policy
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands policy impacts on political representation
activities_projects.evaluation: Strength of arguments and evidence (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Comparative Study of Secularism
activities_projects.objective: Compare secularism in India with other countries
steps: Study how secularism works in India
Compare with secular models in countries like USA or France
Write a comparative analysis highlighting similarities and differences
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of comparison and interpretation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Communalism Case Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Examine real-life consequences of communal politics
steps: Find a historical example of communal conflict in India
Analyse the causes and consequences of the conflict
Suggest democratic measures to prevent such conflicts
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands social and political consequences of communalism
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of investigation and solutions (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Religious Diversity Data Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Interpret religious population data in India
steps: Collect data on population percentages of major religions in India
Represent the data using graphs or charts
Analyse trends and explain implications for democracy
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops statistical interpretation skills in political science
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of data and analysis (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Caste and Economic Inequality Study
activities_projects.objective: Investigate relationship between caste and economic status
steps: Study poverty statistics related to different caste groups
Analyse patterns of inequality in income and education
Explain how historical discrimination influences present conditions
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands socio-economic effects of caste inequality
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of interpretation and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Political Party Caste Strategy Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyse how caste influences election strategies
steps: Study candidate selection in a recent election
Identify how caste composition of voters influences party decisions
Explain whether caste politics strengthens or weakens democracy
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands strategic role of caste in electoral politics

activities_projects.title: Social Reformers Comparative Study
activities_projects.objective: Compare contributions of major anti-caste reformers
steps: Research the works of B.R. Ambedkar, Jyotiba Phule and Periyar
Compare their ideas and approaches to social reform
Write a comparative essay on their contributions
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands historical movements against caste discrimination
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of comparison and understanding (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Debate on Identity Politics
steps: Divide the class into two groups
One group argues identity politics helps disadvantaged groups
The other argues it divides society and weakens democracy
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops critical thinking about social divisions in politics
activities_projects.evaluation: Strength of arguments and participation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Policy Proposal for Social Equality
activities_projects.objective: Design policies to reduce social inequalities
steps: Identify major problems related to gender, religion and caste inequality
Design policies to address these problems
Present your proposal as a policy document
activities_projects.evaluation: Feasibility and originality of proposal (10 marks)
